name: Kat Taylor
subject: The border wall
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | | What started three years ago |
---
---
Friend: Three years ago today, Donald Trump sat behind his desk and signed presidential directives to begin construction of his border wall. With a stroke of his pen, he signed away millions of peoples’ safety, dignity, and human rights. He started a horrible humanitarian crisis that he hasn’t solved, one that is still separating families and stoking the hateful, racist rhetoric that defines his administration. After hearing about the suffering, Tom and I traveled to the border at McAllen, Texas to help where we could. We spent the day at the Catholic Charities of the Rio Grande Valley Humanitarian Respite Center. I will never forget those weary young families, spared by a brief hiatus in child separation, worn thin with stress and exhaustion. I bathed a 19 day old baby, born on the arduous trail. **These families were fleeing violence, committed to a new life in our country. Yet the Trump administration met them with bigotry and inhumanity. I think about those families still.** This wall was one of Trump’s main campaign agendas — a promise he often used to get his supporters all riled up — and he’s turned it into political leverage. But these are people's lives we’re talking about. These are families, people seeking freedom and protection and a better future. They deserve to be received with open arms. [_**Add your name if you agree: What Trump has done to our borders isn’t American. We need compassionate, thoughtful immigration reform, now.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BWV86U6YxL8oXQn6gSo4LYRQ31uV2cs5aFfl0QhXIDJUZse4XyZV-2FsTGLM5DQA-2Bn-2BQaplr3SjSfZDXLOJHc-2FwznNomb8ycxQPXUaMyQVIAJAo-2B-2FQCSuNCAc9rby-2Ftw8ztgG9erf9rAM6N0D3yTq-2FU1y2Ll7LiB-2FD-2Bmj7oN6ZMZYzMPdzx7NYPq9jA7bqARSj8s-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFe8WFWhaBDMMktTsYGvsUpHrWwYazboIvlRM7hkN57aQicNHABX7ed0fBkUQmT40mu6JIn9oTiBHh93jeFntFH33FLQLKboOH4wQkyomFgwyJKGgtT4XE4GgPRxLmZTqrJw6BvRP-2BugwUsaVREJeuI5suTGiFTKrw-2B0yf8f-2Ft-2B5nb1MSRijC3DLY4b7-2FsEECfEidPwbtTnTAiwDdHaqr0wUNtirP-2BOYFfh1ictG7yYItr7zsZxf6gpPZDEhwI-2BHD2goFlzc1s8ZbIdvgbGvP4Ow-2BPJ2c7sIV5aqwsoSlKhWKQ0KIR6DgwoyKGpqYq0qTLWp-2BTdj9B75HqdSEv-2BQ2uod6Jvk0oWAaLuWrNux7ln-2BcQ-3D-3D) Thank you,

_**BREAKING: The Des Moines Register endorses Elizabeth Warren for president**_

**[Iowa's biggest newspaper just endorsed Elizabeth.
Donate to keep up the momentum >>](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a0f1/45c30650/1e15c464e/66e1c572/616992409/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4yT0ZfQU5OX0VORF9RXzIwMjAwMTI1X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN2OF_ANN_END_Q_20200125_V1S1_P")**
Did you hear the big news? The largest newspaper in Iowa, the _Des Moines Register_ , just endorsed Elizabeth for president -- putting our grassroots movement in front of millions of Iowans.

Here's what they had to say:

**"At this moment, when the very fabric of American life is at stake, Elizabeth Warren is the president this nation needs."**

They know what we've known all along -- Elizabeth is the best person to beat Donald Trump in November and root out corruption in Washington once and for all.

And after earning the _New York Times_ endorsement last week, our grassroots movement continues to build the momentum we'll need to win this.

**But as exciting as these endorsements are, they won't mean anything if we don't do the work on the ground to turn out our supporters on February 3.**

Right now, we've got an incredible team of organizers and volunteers knocking on doors, making phone calls, and sharing more about Elizabeth's plans for big, structural change. With just over a week left before the Iowa caucuses, we're in an all-out sprint to make the difference where it counts.

**[Keeping up a ground operation this big takes a lot of resources-- and that's where you come in. clean_body: Iowa's biggest newspaper just endorsed Elizabeth. | | | "" BREAKING: The Des Moines Register endorses Elizabeth Warren for president "" Did you hear the big news? The largest newspaper in Iowa, the Des Moines Register , just endorsed Elizabeth for president -- putting our grassroots movement in front of millions of Iowans. Here's what they had to say: "At this moment, when the very fabric of American life is at stake, Elizabeth Warren is the president this nation needs." They know what we've known all along -- Elizabeth is the best person to beat Donald Trump in November and root out corruption in Washington once and for all. And after earning the New York Times endorsement last week, our grassroots movement continues to build the momentum we'll need to win this. But as exciting as these endorsements are, they won't mean anything if we don't do the work on the ground to turn out our supporters on February 3. Right now, we've got an incredible team of organizers and volunteers knocking on doors, making phone calls, and sharing more about Elizabeth's plans for big, structural change. With just over a week left before the Iowa caucuses, we're in an all-out sprint to make the difference where it counts. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Thank you for your support, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Adam Schiff: "If the truth doesn't matter, we're lost."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | "If the truth doesn't matter, we're lost. "Framers couldn't protect us from ourselves, if right and truth don't matter. "And you know that what he did was not right. You know, that's what they do in the old country, that Colonel Vindman's father came from. Or the old country that my great grandfather came from, or the old countries that your ancestors came from, or maybe you came from. But here, right is supposed to matter. It's what's made us the greatest nation on earth. No constitution can protect us if right doesn't matter anymore. "And you know you can't trust this president to do what's right for this country. You can trust he will do what's right for Donald Trump. "He'll do it now. He's done it before. He'll do it for the next several months. "He'll do it in the election if he's allowed to. "This is why, if you find him guilty, you must find that he should be removed. Because right matters. Because right matters, and the truth matters. Otherwise, we are lost." **Should Trump be removed from office?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfbe/6e9863e8/83c4fcf/1db050a9/4249942370/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ns2Dy9kT") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfbe/6e9863e8/83c4fcf/1db050a9/4249942370/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ns2Dy9kT") Thank you for your response, The WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfbe/6e9863e8/83c4fcf/1db050a9/4249942370/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ns2Dy9kT")

name: Michael's iPhone
subject: before you go to sleep
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Hello friends,

After a long week of the impeachment trial in Washington, I'm back on the trail in New Hampshire talking to the voters in this state, the majority of whom are still undecided.

I just talked to my finance team, and they're saying we need at least 10 people from Pennsylvania to donate before midnight tonight to stay on track and keep our new ads on the air.

[Can I count on you to make your first donation?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab74/134673f2/8624142/69975d58/4102473193/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twoweeksad?refcode=EM_FR_B3_012520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Thank you. I know we can win this together.

Michael

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Our grassroots campaign is up against a big test. After this month, we'll release a public report on how much we've raised in January. So with this deadline approaching, I'm asking:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We can end Washington corruption, rebuild the middle class, and save our democracy. But only if we keep growing our grassroots movement with grassroots donors in your state and across the country. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a003/45c30650/1e1015464/66e1cd8f/1742802316/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I'm committed to being the best president that money can't buy.

When I first launched my campaign, I announced I would take the time presidential candidates typically reserve for courting wealthy donors and instead, use it to spend time with supporters, volunteers, and staff across the country.

Together, we've built a powerful grassroots movement that will win the White House, Congress, state legislatures, and more.

**But the truth is, our grassroots campaign is up against a big test. After this month, we'll release a public report on how much we've raised in January.**

**This report is going to set the tone for 2020, and we need those fundraising numbers to be as strong as possible. So with this deadline approaching, I'm asking:**

**[Will you pitch in $2 or whatever you can today to help grow our campaign before the final FEC deadline before Iowa?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a003/45c30650/1e1015464/66e1cdf0/1742802316/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4yQkZfRUdSX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwMTI1X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN2BF_EGR_EWD_E_20200125_V1S3_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
>
When I ran for office for the first time, not very long ago, I had a lot to learn.

But here was the first -- and most important -- lesson I got: Nobody does this on their own.

I'm grateful down to my toes for everyone who knocks on doors, makes phone calls, texts their friends about our new plans, hosts debate watch parties, and chips in $2 at a time. For everyone who makes this campaign their own. For everyone who's in this fight all the way.

If -- and only if -- we fight side by side, we can beat the big banks, the fossil fuel giants, the huge pharmaceutical companies -- everyone who's been rigging the rules and pulling the strings so our economy and our government only work for the wealthy and well-connected.

**We can end Washington corruption, rebuild the middle class, and save our democracy. But only if we keep growing our grassroots movement with grassroots donors in Pennsylvania and across the country.**

**[That comes down to hitting our January fundraising goal and starting 2020 strong. Time's running short before the final FEC deadline before Iowa. If you can, please make a contribution today-- I'll be deeply grateful.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a003/45c30650/1e1015464/66e1cdf0/1742802316/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4yQkZfRUdSX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwMTI1X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN2BF_EGR_EWD_E_20200125_V1S3_P")**

Elizabeth

clean_body: We can end Washington corruption, rebuild the middle class, and save our democracy. But only if we keep growing our grassroots movement with grassroots donors in your state and across the country. | | | "" I'm committed to being the best president that money can't buy. When I first launched my campaign, I announced I would take the time presidential candidates typically reserve for courting wealthy donors and instead, use it to spend time with supporters, volunteers, and staff across the country. Together, we've built a powerful grassroots movement that will win the White House, Congress, state legislatures, and more. But the truth is, our grassroots campaign is up against a big test. After this month, we'll release a public report on how much we've raised in January. This report is going to set the tone for 2020, and we need those fundraising numbers to be as strong as possible. So with this deadline approaching, I'm asking: "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" When I ran for office for the first time, not very long ago, I had a lot to learn. But here was the first -- and most important -- lesson I got: Nobody does this on their own. I'm grateful down to my toes for everyone who knocks on doors, makes phone calls, texts their friends about our new plans, hosts debate watch parties, and chips in $2 at a time. For everyone who makes this campaign their own. For everyone who's in this fight all the way. If -- and only if -- we fight side by side, we can beat the big banks, the fossil fuel giants, the huge pharmaceutical companies -- everyone who's been rigging the rules and pulling the strings so our economy and our government only work for the wealthy and well-connected. We can end Washington corruption, rebuild the middle class, and save our democracy. But only if we keep growing our grassroots movement with grassroots donors in Pennsylvania and across the country. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Dean Browning
subject: Reminder: Impeachment Has Finally Moved To The Senate
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
Nancy Pelosi and her pawn, Schifty Adam Schiff, have finally moved the impeachment process to the Senate despite having no evidence of wrongdoing by the President. I am happy that the process is moving forward as it will finally allow us to put this crazy Witch Hunt to an end! Once this charade is over, President Donald J. Trump can get back to working for the American people.
As one of the President's strongest supporters, it is my mission to help him win re-election in 2020 and to work with the President in bringing back true Conservative values to the Lehigh Valley.
But we cannot do this by ourselves. We rely on grassroots supporters like yourself to chip-in to the cause and help fight back against the Liberal Elite. Will you consider supporting myself and President Donald J. Trump as we fight to win in November 2020? A donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 will go a long way in beating the Liberal Elites come this fall!

We need a Representative who will side with hard-working Americans, not just the Liberal Elite, and one who will support President Donald J. Trump's agenda in Making America Great Again! name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump should take a look at these numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, According to Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight, pollsters may be overstating Trump's popularity at 42% job approval because they aren't factoring increased polarization into their questions. When they do, his relative approval rating drops even further. Some polling is even placing him as low as 37%. Yet they also found that despite Trump's low nationwide popularity, Republican voters are unmoved and rank him second only to Reagan in terms of favorability. With all of the news coming out of the Senate trial and given these conflicting results, we need to hear directly from you today: **Do you approve of Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfb8/6e9863e8/839d1f0/1db050b3/1263277797/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Q7D2NQ6B") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfb8/6e9863e8/839d1f0/1db050b3/1263277797/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Q7D2NQ6B") Thank you so much for your participation. -WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfb8/6e9863e8/839d1f0/1db050b3/1263277797/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Q7D2NQ6B")

name: Wendy Davis
subject: What I'm seeing on impeachment:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
When all is said and done, what kind of country are we leaving for our kids and grandkids?
| | | [](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "http://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-impeachment_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk68-su-nd")
---
Friend,

As I watch this impeachment trial, I'm left wondering: When all is said and done, what kind of country are we leaving for our kids and grandkids? Republican senators seem to be doing all they can to stifle the full truth and protect the president, sending a message to the world that, in their minds, politics is above the law.
That's not the kind of country I want my grandbabies to grow up in. I want them to thrive in a nation that cherishes the rule of law - the principle on which America was founded. Power does not belong to any singular political figure. Power rests with _We the People_.
**And yet, even as polling revealed almost three quarters of Americans believe witnesses should be allowed to testify in the impeachment trial, GOP senators have blocked witness testimony.** They've also allowed the White House to block the release of key documents, something President Trump himself bragged about.
One of the greatest things about our republic is our freedom to speak truth to power. In historic times like this, it's crucial we use our voices to stand up for what's right. **So today, I 'm asking 4,500 supporters to speak out - including you. Please respond now by answering the following question:**
| | **Should the Senate allow new witness testimony and documents in the impeachment trial?**
---
| | | [YES](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "http://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-impeachment_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk68-su-nd")
---
| [NO](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "http://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-impeachment_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk68-su-nd")
---
Thank you for making your voice heard during this critical moment for our country.

Wendy
| If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can **[click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361acd/704929dc/1619320d/39938232/2654023119/VEsC/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter")**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361acd/704929dc/1619320d/39938235/2654023119/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails"). [To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361acd/704929dc/1619320d/39938234/2654023119/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe") | Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
---

subject: Cresco anti-McConnell signatures needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
I need 10,000 signatures on my emergency petition demanding McConnell give the press FULL access to the Senate impeachment proceedings >>
---
| | [**BREAKING: Press BLOCKED from fully covering Senate impeachment proceedings**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b714/18e32a7f/516be1e7/7b2262bb/2314938979/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-survey?source=20200126_em_pet_b1_stavbrl_all_rs") [McConnell is BLOCKING the press from fully covering the Senate's impeachment trial. It's shocking. I need 10,000 signatures on my emergency petition demanding FULL press access. Can I count on yours? >> ](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b714/18e32a7f/516be1e7/7b2262b8/2314938979/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-survey?source=20200126_em_pet_b1_stavbrl_all") | This is the most important ask I have ever made of you:

Mitch McConnell is SEVERELY limiting reporters from the Senate's impeachment proceedings. _**I can 't overstate how disturbing this is. **_

_[**BEFORE MIDNIGHT: I need 10,000 signatures on my emergency petition demanding McConnell give the press FULL access. This is one of the most critical moments in our country 's history. Americans have the right to see exactly how it unfolds. >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b714/18e32a7f/516be1e7/7b2262bb/2314938979/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-survey?source=20200126_em_pet_b1_stavbrl_all_rs")_
** ** ****NAME** : **dpwillis67@gmail.com**** ** ** | **[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b714/18e32a7f/516be1e7/7b2262bb/2314938979/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-survey?source=20200126_em_pet_b1_stavbrl_all_rs")**
---

I don't have much time.

Mitch McConnell is SEVERELY limiting press from covering the Senate's impeachment trial.

**I can 't overstate how incredibly dangerous this censorship is. **

The right of the press to freely cover our country's elected officials is paramount -- it's a right enshrined in our Constitution.

I will not let Mitch McConnell cover up President Trump's corruption behind closed doors.

Americans deserve to watch his every move throughout these critical proceedings.

_[**I need 10,000 signatures on my emergency petition demanding McConnell give press FULL access. This is one of the most critical moments in our country 's history. Ben Ray

He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. name: Charles Booker
subject: Did you see the message from my mom?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOOKER FOR KENTUCKY, LTD
body:
|
---
Folks, I’m reaching out to make sure you saw this message from the person who taught me the power of sacrifice: My mom. When there wasn’t enough food for both of us, my mom went without so I didn’t have to. She saw my worth. My humanity. And I see yours, too. Like Mama says, we all have to make sacrifices sometimes, but no one should have to struggle to put a roof over their head or put food on the table. **[I’m working toward a $15,000 end-of-month goal to stay on track. Take a moment to read my mom’s words — then donate $5 or more to my campaign for U.S. Senate so we can meet our goal and finally defeat Mitch McConnell.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14319173/149990679/2002883901?refcode=cb2020126nd_a1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDI4ZDc5OS04ZjQwLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fLa9yE-rhdO9SeWtcfgn9thVEax2UAE3h3HF-OLxGUk=)** ******[Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14319174/149990680/2072759943?refcode=cb2020126nd_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDI4ZDc5OS04ZjQwLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fLa9yE-rhdO9SeWtcfgn9thVEax2UAE3h3HF-OLxGUk=)****** Our movement is about winning our future back. Let’s stand together to make it happen, Charles \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Earletta Hearn (Charles' Mom)
Date: Fri, Jan 24, 2020
Subject: new blood Hi there, When my son, Charles, was growing up, I knew he’d end up doing something powerful. At 3 years old, he told me he wanted to be a lawyer. When he applied to law school, I knew he’d get in because our faith had gotten us through so many challenges together already. When Charles was in law school, people told him he didn’t belong there. I told him that when people try to tell you what you can’t do, you show them what you’re capable of. And he did. That’s because he’d already seen what he could do despite the struggles he faced during his childhood. There were times when I would skip meals so he could eat. At one point, we didn’t have a place to live because our house burned down — but we kept moving forward. We did the best with what we had, but Charles always understood that there was a better way. As rich as the United States is, there are certain things that every person should have to lead a healthy life, like healthcare and a basic minimum income. Charles is ready to represent Kentuckians in the U.S. Senate because he’s lived through the real struggles other politicians just talk about. He knows that to get something different, you have to do something different. Kentucky needs new blood. That’s Charles — the blood that will run through the veins of Kentucky and bring new life. **_****_**[If you agree, will you chip in $5 or more to support my son’s campaign? He’s working toward a $15,000 end-of-month goal, and support from people like you is how we’ll stay on track and finally defeat Mitch McConnell.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14319175/149990681/2072759943?refcode=cb2020126nd_a2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDI4ZDc5OS04ZjQwLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fLa9yE-rhdO9SeWtcfgn9thVEax2UAE3h3HF-OLxGUk=)**_****_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **** | ******[Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14319176/149990682/2072759943?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=cb2020126nd-AB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDI4ZDc5OS04ZjQwLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fLa9yE-rhdO9SeWtcfgn9thVEax2UAE3h3HF-OLxGUk=)******

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Just wanted to say hi!
body:
It’s Sunday and I hope you’re enjoying your day.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-361910-847098-4837049-9765274f72-7ab6fa3e96)
Patriot,

It’s Sunday and I hope you’re enjoying your day.

I’m catching up on work from the week and preparing for an event tomorrow night, but I wanted to shoot you a quick note on a few things.

President Trump is finally able to present his case against impeachment and I’m thankful.

This isn’t about “abuse of power” or anything else. This is yet another attempt by Democrats to interfere with a Presidential Election.

And the irony is that the Democrats primary argument is that President Trump was trying to take down Joe Biden before 2020. So what do the Democrats to? They try and remove the sitting President of the United States BEFORE he can run for a second term!

**Congress needs a total overhaul and it STARTS with my election to Congress.**

[Help me get to Washington by donating today!](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-361910-847098-4837048-41e9b87fd4-7ab6fa3e96)

Nancy Pelosi is going to have to do all that she can to stop me from defeating her top lieutenant and my opponent, Lois Frankel.

Think about it.

**Do you really think Pelosi, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib and AOC will want me sharing the House floor with them?**

Not a chance and they’ll put in MILLIONS to stop me – draining their war chest to try and defeat me.

But I will still win, and so will dozens of other Republicans as the DCCC will abandon other races to try and stop me.

**Let’s give them a run for their money!** [Donate to take my campaign to the next level.](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-361910-847098-4837048-41e9b87fd4-7ab6fa3e96)

Right now, I have volunteers collecting petitions to get me on the ballot. We have a few thousand more to collect and we’ll be done within a few weeks.

If you can, [please make a small donation](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-361910-847098-4837048-41e9b87fd4-7ab6fa3e96) to cover some of the expenses for our hard-working volunteers. From covering a parking spot for a day to gas money, or even a quick, inexpensive lunch, [any costs you can help cover will be greatly appreciated.](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-361910-847098-4837048-41e9b87fd4-7ab6fa3e96)

Thanks again for all that you do and I hope you enjoy the rest of your weekend!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Second Amendment Sanctuary Movement
body:
To read this newsletter in HTML format, click https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/mr/rvs0tV-syDq4EbqR6KK9k7kbDnw39_onqLh--oHHFuDoCOaM8w8Y2KSQW4C5E-kQAG6R8wkbaJQ2zEqxeq-NGss5lqJN-CI8tWE_U87dK4GcLEX7Last week the legislature voted to spend $18 million of your money. Read Why!

[ ]( https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/kG-7WB3-i-oG847SODYhpl4MpusPUSrhoKHwHL2DB0nH-WDkNS_RI1tekKW-dTKZUAtdNlcwkD3tKTY1mzKTOEYD2a8NrUtq3SMjtUY8fFGgc9BaIg50zFPDlLZvqh-p2n4A2xZLiyIerUBcbLiar2qo-8T-zG1DORVgT1VBcOHOj3aX_iM3xh1Q )
>From Your Capitol - January 26, 2020

The third week of the 2020 legislative session was a busy week that began with a rally supporting our second amendment rights and solidarity with fellow patriots in Virginia.

Their actions did not go answered because the next day Desoto County passed a Second Amendment Sanctuary resolution as did Alcorn and Lawrence. Citizens from several other counties have successfully placed the resolution on the agenda for their next county board meeting and many more are working to do the same. I’ve received reports that Stone, Lincoln, and Tishomingo will vote on the resolution soon.

I attended the county board meetings of Desoto and Alcorn Counties on Tuesday, it was inspirational to watch citizens voice their opinions and demand their local officials take a stand to protect their rights.

The people of Mississippi are truly great people. [ Continue Reading ]( https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/OIkZa4OuixOLc18Wq4ZBKHmP6wY8HbrrpEHSVaFv3Q9SJJ7JMJaCi7dPm3LqISZSyYkAT8w8EdC1d3ZCpylH1jL_vg2oXW0Ufz_dKINgxE1fzUs0uKDRgMRwULyuxheaoYWZlw_nxmZsE3H65R9fFPGJP9g7ujLZi6eZNib1gvHIn_ivvXIHGSvRyOYatvUD4icKTWNNGIOXw7uURa5QC-owPvGpWU_0pdDLH67H )

From Your Capitol - January 19, 2020

The second week of the 2020 legislative session was full of ceremony and history.

Sometimes I get frustrated and tired of all the ceremonial procedures of government but I realize that for two hundred years the people of Mississippi have been participating in these rituals and ceremonies.

They tie us to our past and help us realize the importance of the decisions made by our government.

[ Read More ]( https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/UXOFjsARxpIMNq17zvwCjsentEtUfZQO_l3gvMPXVToPcLMdF1eKBQppFvatMZeDzX9cj54K71ljumJLapQ-8yngKWkHSFw5mNy_AvmZPXMJZR1qhCp9iVxLL2UbMnttwMWj9cs8ZunIcQEUMhTpL2mDmrEHVJKuLGQTmTnEPdOEPgE95Lap-j1jnXu6vJabdclSCWo_G_MsAh3gqiAnk2LSyGnVtu82nePu3orY )

Tyranny in Virginia

Tyranny: a government in which absolute power is vested in a single ruler

Virginia Democrats introduce a bundle of radical laws to limit 2A rights, militias, sale transfer and registration bills, and the citizens in the State of Virginia say NO, we’re going to vote you all out next term.
Virginia government, lead by Democrats, responds by introducing a bill to eliminate voter ID.
[ Read More ]( https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/iDu7ZelpUN1Gxf7vpL8J3qM22s92h9uBWlrOsjx_q-lpjizQQoGO3SZ8m29A95hvJ76vsdaeUEDu-ZSydeC4Ywvd7nPCLCfyVxzixcZ2PagwIZ2RGMnmb6iefsiOpdf1FWLuWGpflwmNl2u5DjxCRMoDhz5GcLGrsVvC5uTusu_uGpGFfj1e9lOqIokUdTUzE10ynb6CThUiq-mE1YzecfUOVdLUg_MsJRtfpR8ZVK2k4J1fo1HmLvfIMjj_-F_x )

As a strict conservative I don't vote to increase your taxes or to spend your money on wasteful projects. This means many of the deep-pocket lobbyist are not supportive of my efforts. While other elected offcials receive regular donations from road builders, who want a gas tax increase, and large hospitals, who want to expand medicaid, I recieve none.

That is why I need your help. Sending this email cost several hundred dollars each month, maintaining my website cost over $1000 each year. Please consider donating, even a $10 donation makes a huge difference.
[ DONATE TODAY ]( https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sK6BqPMI_GiKapNgRFwohRsEkZobt-oUnYpO02nsPytCPCeAH9rurP4XeTXlgEAaeQBEtg7oL21cWy33jgS-_7iaSMKJa6miTjPkpAR-vlGKJfwY0EwVJ6eH_YZ0ConkqEivRG1tr-2ys3g93A19CvSM60rks2Dyup16123LOwquqWnnq8Da7Cj1K6MGNDa6ScKg )

body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friend,
Governor Grisham has announced that she will support so-called "red flag laws" during the 2020 legislative session. These laws allow anyone to flag law-abiding citizens as an imminent danger. Once you are flagged, a judge can take away your firearms without giving you the opportunity to defend yourself in court. Innocent until proven guilty becomes guilty until proven innocent.

name: Congressman Al Green
subject: I support Planned Parenthood -- do you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/T0PB-ikECy3jZx7nynUOU-8d7nlwmrHNFroTvhr-Em8=/AWWgGn2sUDlKFhqC4XBha9vlAVQbeYbPMpHKwJ16juM=)
---
Folks, **On this week in 1973, the Supreme Court ruled that a woman 's right to choose is a constitutionally protected right. **Nearly 50 years later, anti-choice Republicans across the country -- including in my home state of Texas -- are _**still**_ working to bring us back in time and overturn _Roe v. Wade_. **In fact, the Supreme Court -- now stacked with conservative judges -- is set to hear a case later this year that could reverse Roe v. Wade and allow states to institute severe and debilitating restrictions on a woman 's right to choose.** [**This is a make-or-break moment for the pro-choice movement, and we need everyone to step up. That 's why I'm asking you to make a donation to the Planned Parenthood Action Fund, so we can fight back against anti-choice extremism in Texas, in Washington, and across the country.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/T0PB-ikECy3jZx7nynUOU-8d7nlwmrHNFroTvhr-Em8=/AWWgGn2sUDlKFhqC4XBha9vlAVQbeYbPMpHKwJ16juM=) **SUPPORT THE PLANNED PARENTHOOD ACTION FUND** | [DONATE $10](https://act.myngp.com/el/T0PB-ikECy3jZx7nynUOU-8d7nlwmrHNFroTvhr-Em8=/vkB5inq0HbDPNYbrT8YdpjsMPSy3T5AAEVu0dewP7OY=) | [DONATE $20](https://act.myngp.com/el/T0PB-ikECy3jZx7nynUOU-8d7nlwmrHNFroTvhr-Em8=/1O61MUx9ZBE_UNv4e_ZrqJh1rDK8qepK5ap2-i3JdjU=)

[DONATE $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/T0PB-ikECy3jZx7nynUOU-8d7nlwmrHNFroTvhr-Em8=/n8hLbIJcS8SbBwd5QH8igQs9WEV5eBfUnO5QJkqdK5o=) | [Other amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/T0PB-ikECy3jZx7nynUOU-8d7nlwmrHNFroTvhr-Em8=/AWWgGn2sUDlKFhqC4XBha9vlAVQbeYbPMpHKwJ16juM=)
Planned Parenthood has been helping women take control of their reproductive healthcare for over 100 years, and the Planned Parenthood Action Fund works to elect pro-choice leaders and fight back against unjust restrictions on reproductive rights. With over 25 new anti-abortion laws enacted in 2019, Planned Parenthood needs our support now more than ever.
**NO ONE has the right to tell a woman what to do with her body -- least of all, the government.[I hope you'll join me in supporting a woman's right to choose by donating to the Planned Parenthood Action Fund.](https://act.myngp.com/el/T0PB-ikECy3jZx7nynUOU-8d7nlwmrHNFroTvhr-Em8=/AWWgGn2sUDlKFhqC4XBha9vlAVQbeYbPMpHKwJ16juM=)**

name: Team Markey
subject: The stakes have never been higher for our planet and our movement.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
Our fight against the climate crisis has never been more important.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de41/693b8b0a/435f946b/72de49ab/868314759/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
Our fight against the climate crisis has never been more important.
The past decade was the hottest on record. Our planet is on fire. The time we have left to prevent irreversible damage to our planet disappears by the day.
[](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de41/693b8b0a/435f946b/72de49aa/868314759/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200126-full")
Ed has been sounding the alarm on this crisis for decades. He was a lonely voice warning of a warming planet at the 1980 Democratic National Convention.
[](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de41/693b8b0a/435f946b/72de49aa/868314759/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200126-full")
But now our movement is stronger than ever. We have a grassroots army of intergenerational supporters who are putting their bodies on the line for this planet.
[](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de41/693b8b0a/435f946b/72de49aa/868314759/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200126-full")
Now, it's up to us to keep the father of the Green New Deal in this fight.
[](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de41/693b8b0a/435f946b/72de49aa/868314759/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200126-full")
We need Ed in the Senate if we're going to pass the Green New Deal and save our planet. But he's facing his toughest campaign ever, and he's counting on your support.
**[Can you make a $3 donation right now to help us win this race? It is going to take an army of grassroots supporters to re-elect Ed and pass the Green New Deal.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de41/693b8b0a/435f946b/72de49aa/868314759/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200126-full")**
The stakes are higher than ever for our planet and our movement. But together, we will win and defeat those who want to stop our progress.
\- Team Markey
**[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de41/693b8b0a/435f946b/72de49aa/868314759/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200126-full")**

* * *
Paid for by The Markey Committee
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de41/693b8b0a/435f946b/72de49a9/868314759/VEsO/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://ma.edmarkey.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Senator Ed Markey with a contribution, [click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de41/693b8b0a/435f946b/72de49a8/868314759/VEsP/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_footer").

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Only 9 months 'til Election Day:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Trump won Wisconsin in 2016 by just 0.77%, fewer than 23,000 votes. The state's planned purge of 200,000 voters mostly in Dem-leaning cities could easily mean Trump wins Winsconsin again, potentially handing him another 4 years in the White House. In 2016, millions of voters were discouraged or intimidated from voting at all, and Donald Trump won Michigan by just 0.23% and Pennsylvania by just 0.72%. They're trying to make this happen again in 2020. On top of that, Trump's approval rating is holding steady around 43%, and 16% of Democrats don't support impeaching Trump. He is on track to win re-election. That's why we need to know if your voting plans have changed: **Do you plan to vote for Trump in 2020?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfbc/6e9863e8/83483b9/1db050bd/2990652936/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/fy_c6bQD") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfbc/6e9863e8/83483b9/1db050bd/2990652936/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/fy_c6bQD") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfbc/6e9863e8/83483b9/1db050bd/2990652936/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/fy_c6bQD")

subject: Can you help with this?

If we’re going to make actual progress for Montanans, like lowering the cost of prescription drugs, protecting our public lands from privatization and doing what’s right for workers, we have to flip the Senate blue -- and that starts with winning in Montana.
We already have a Democratic Governor and Senator. So, we know we can win. **But in order to beat an entrenched incumbent that takes money from every corporate PAC that’s willing to give to him, we need a coalition of grassroots supporters.**

name: Sara Gideon for Senate
subject: Senator Collins is saving all her disappointment for Democrats (Trump tweet)
body:
Friends,
Last week, Senator Collins passed Chief Justice Roberts a note complaining about Jerry Nadler's conduct during the impeachment trial.
But she doesn't have anything to say when Trump tweets and threatens Adam Schiff:
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ed4/4bef7a87/6a8a9fad/287f89ec/1624568273/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjYtMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200126-2-b")
**********[FIGHT BACK](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ed4/4bef7a87/6a8a9fad/287f89ec/1624568273/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjYtMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200126-2-b")**********

**[Rush a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon's campaign for U.S. Senate right now. Keep fighting,
Team Sara

name: Team Joe
subject: We haven't heard from you in a while, Peter. Here's a great opportunity to get involved today:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
|
---
Peter, we noticed you haven't been engaged with our emails lately, so we wanted to send you an opportunity to get involved today on one of the most important issues of our campaign.

Our country continues to witness unspeakable gun violence every day.

As Vice President Biden said, the American people may be running out of tears, but we cannot run out of strength and resolve to get something done.

**We must act now to end the violence --[will you sign our petition to demand that Congress BAN assault weapons and high-capacity magazines now?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/293188c2/1cd0ac28/c4f309f2/3565bedf/490963440/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Ban-Assault-Weapons?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.01.26_B8_reactivation-tier2-reactivationsend3_X__F1_S1_C1__str&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.01.26_B8_reactivation-tier2-reactivationsend3_X__F1_S1_C1__str")** | [ADD YOUR NAME ➞](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/293188c2/1cd0ac28/c4f309f2/3565bede/490963440/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Ban-Assault-Weapons?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.01.26_B8_reactivation-tier2-reactivationsend3_X__F1_S1_C1__str&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.01.26_B8_reactivation-tier2-reactivationsend3_X__F1_S1_C1__str")
---
Assault weapons and high-capacity magazines are meant for war. There's just no reason why someone needs a military-grade weapon that can fire more than 30 rounds per minute. And there's just no reason why someone needs to be able to fire off 100 rounds before reloading.

Joe Biden understands this.**[That's why, with Senator Feinstein, he successfully led the effort to enact the only ban on assault weapons and high-capacity magazines that we've ever had, which the Bush Administration and a Republican Congress refused to renew in 2004.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/293188c2/1cd0ac28/c4f309f2/3565bedf/490963440/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Ban-Assault-Weapons?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.01.26_B8_reactivation-tier2-reactivationsend3_X__F1_S1_C1__str&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.01.26_B8_reactivation-tier2-reactivationsend3_X__F1_S1_C1__str")**

And Peter, he wants your help to ban assault weapons and high-capacity magazines once more. [**So if you 're with him, sign your name to tell Congress to ban these weapons of war now ->**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/293188c2/1cd0ac28/c4f309f2/3565bedf/490963440/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Ban-Assault-Weapons?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.01.26_B8_reactivation-tier2-reactivationsend3_X__F1_S1_C1__str&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.01.26_B8_reactivation-tier2-reactivationsend3_X__F1_S1_C1__str")

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Ban-Assault-Weapons**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/293188c2/1cd0ac28/c4f309f2/3565bedf/490963440/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Ban-Assault-Weapons?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.01.26_B8_reactivation-tier2-reactivationsend3_X__F1_S1_C1__str&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.01.26_B8_reactivation-tier2-reactivationsend3_X__F1_S1_C1__str")

Thanks for your help,

_Team Joe_

---

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/293188c2/1cd0ac28/c4f309f2/3565bed6/490963440/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/293188c2/1cd0ac28/c4f309f2/3565bed5/490963440/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/293188c2/1cd0ac28/c4f309f2/3565bed8/490963440/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/293188c2/1cd0ac28/c4f309f2/3565bed3/490963440/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: TomSteyer.com
subject: The Lev Parnas recording
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
On Saturday, an audio recording was released of Trump asking his unofficial aide, Lev Parnas, to fire the Ukrainian ambassador to the United States. Friend, **this is a clear example of Trump putting his own interests above national security.** However, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell urged Republicans to pass rules for the trial that exclude the introduction of new evidence. **Add your name to demand that the Senate conduct a fair trial and allow the introduction of relevant evidence like this recording.**

Our campaign has been showing up, listening to Iowans, and now we've met with conservatives at EVERY county GOP. Let's keep this momentum going!

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0507b0660e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0507b0660e-25822489

Hello

I've been pounding the pavement on the trail and now our campaign has met with EVERY active county GOP in Iowa's Fourth District. That's 37 out of 37. The grassroots support our campaign has felt has been incredible, but we're not stopping now. With less than 20 weeks until Primary Day, I need your help...
* Do you plan on going to caucus this year?
* Can you bring some neighbors together for a small meeting with me?
* Do you know a place to put a yard or barn sign?
* Can you think of another way to help our campaign?

Let me know by clicking the button below ⬇️ (https://emojipedia.org/downwards-black-arrow/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0507b0660e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0507b0660e-25822489)
VOLUNTEER HERE (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0507b0660e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0507b0660e-25822489)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Please read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together in the new year.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,
p.s. 127 DAYS until the primary on June 2nd. We NEED your support (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0507b0660e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0507b0660e-25822489) today!
BUILDING OUR NETWORK

Wrapped up two great meetings this week with the Dickinson County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/Dickinson-County-Iowa-GOP-986112074805887/?__tn__=K-R&eid=ARAEMPklm8wbmGKSOvSjioIX3dZqboETS1zQJoJB3nMVZTlSmF9deEjrV2wT0x4oomI74ZeFZIMnkPS8&fref=mentions&__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARDB2XG-Y22G9Fz4K8hnwYhdwzYeMUpBJnXH-QDnBAAk4SMXCPZ4xCCILFOQpE1akbwFVPE0bPvJY8OSkCR56t5UXQdW-NIk7OPQSjh6ZDdBanf-nn62n2rgYNthyZ1QcOrl8OXS_lUspG3uFgon8LVbS20wHdgWfke3p7vrVobnoOLeS5DOJVRxH6D2J1oCoQrS1idDLT7dNQkoo49vglEWjungqk4WtyGCrzn3GHmiSnceZ6cYlKVeU6oYqDrjKeJtwVbHmnw55KWx82e6sVJSmdYaEa9LOhzcLvlGaT1oHsfZVP9O2XGxoL593UJzczUPPXtIAucbfQ3rBrX75UUjxXIc&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0507b0660e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0507b0660e-25822489) in Spirit Lake and Cherokee County GOP
(https://www.facebook.com/cherokeeiagop/?__tn__=K-R&eid=ARDBO_stfUZYbRziOLpJ7hC1OIeLvYGKs8oXFefm0WZ81uGBdDm9GSjMh9TGivlDtMZ30XAE3WIp7Kh_&fref=mentions&__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARDPcQlolD9JMGl33mWP20oIVrA4p3Mc43_V3H4ZSK06uh7VhG9KPzzzAwPXDwWWX1INmgKUW8ukfNTu981qxZFg03-D1Dvf6jC0ql9FebgKjcgzhNCFJahN6HHgFXpP1Bask82gOJfq4NWC34whMoS6viYCl5U1JBz-M6MqplgrLu7SNWNrB9V7vP9oW0iLPi7PJzF9_qcR2AV03lyOhttGEfNl1QsPxs1FYGjPcAbH5RX8BgFV9dx07dsEeGEIFwx4GIzdQD2n6x4GC_K6DB8EmI41Fe_gSuRHwLXOTHtFGzP6TkP82vPcpDA2TAjQBC7tIAsWzeS29aDI-stPcN0yKBbd&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0507b0660e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0507b0660e-25822489) in Cherokee. Now, our campaign has heard from conservative Iowans at EVERY active central committee in the Fourth District.

Iowans across this state are looking for the candidate to deliver on lower healthcare costs, a balanced budget, and a secured right to keep and bear arms. As conservatives, we know that Big Government causes Big Problems but we must elect people who show real commitment to shrinking our overgrown federal government.
RECENT COVERAGE

https://richardsforcongress.com/republican-primary-challenger-visits-clarion/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0507b0660e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0507b0660e-25822489

https://clarionnewsonline.com/content/republican-primary-challenger-visits-clarion?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0507b0660e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0507b0660e-25822489

"Richards positioned himself as a strong Trump supporter and spoke against the president’s recent impeachment, which he called 'a crock.' He spoke about what he sees as government corruption at other levels though, including concerning former FBI Director James Comey."
UP NEXT

Looking forward to a busy week meeting with the Crawford County Republican Women (https://www.facebook.com/events/471538103530496/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0507b0660e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0507b0660e-25822489) in Denison, Kossuth County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/Kossuth-County-Republicans-635696166482379?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0507b0660e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0507b0660e-25822489) in Algona, and two house parties in Sioux City and Moville. President Trump is coming to Iowa (https://www.donaldjtrump.com/events/des-moines-ia-jan-30-2020?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0507b0660e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0507b0660e-25822489) on Thursday and it'll be a great time in Des Moines!

STAY INFORMED

clean_body: Our campaign has been showing up, listening to Iowans, and now we've met with conservatives at EVERY county GOP. Let's keep this momentum going! Hello I've been pounding the pavement on the trail and now our campaign has met with EVERY active county GOP in Iowa's Fourth District. That's 37 out of 37. The grassroots support our campaign has felt has been incredible, but we're not stopping now. With less than 20 weeks until Primary Day, I need your help... Do you plan on going to caucus this year? Can you bring some neighbors together for a small meeting with me? Do you know a place to put a yard or barn sign? Can you think of another way to help our campaign? Let me know by clicking the button below ⬇️ () VOLUNTEER HERE () As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you. Please read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together in the new year. I appreciate your continued support. Your neighbor, p.s. 127 DAYS until the primary on June 2nd. We NEED your support () today! BUILDING OUR NETWORK Wrapped up two great meetings this week with the Dickinson County GOP () in Spirit Lake and Cherokee County GOP () in Cherokee. Now, our campaign has heard from conservative Iowans at EVERY active central committee in the Fourth District. Iowans across this state are looking for the candidate to deliver on lower healthcare costs, a balanced budget, and a secured right to keep and bear arms. As conservatives, we know that Big Government causes Big Problems but we must elect people who show real commitment to shrinking our overgrown federal government. RECENT COVERAGE "Richards positioned himself as a strong Trump supporter and spoke against the president’s recent impeachment, which he called 'a crock.' He spoke about what he sees as government corruption at other levels though, including concerning former FBI Director James Comey." UP NEXT Looking forward to a busy week meeting with the Crawford County Republican Women () in Denison, Kossuth County GOP () in Algona, and two house parties in Sioux City and Moville. President Trump is coming to Iowa () on Thursday and it'll be a great time in Des Moines! STAY INFORMED On the issues: Protecting Life () Lowering Healthcare Costs () Securing the Border () Sticking up for Iowa Energy () and much more... () GET INVOLVED BARN SIGNS ARE AVAILABLE NOW! EMAIL INFO@RICHARDSFORCONGRESS.COM (mailto:info@richardsforcongress.com) TO GET YOURS TODAY! We can't let this election be determined by Washington or Des Moines insiders. Send your neighbor to Congress instead! Even if you're unable to donate () we still need your help! Want to serve as a precinct captain? Know a good place for a barn sign? name: Cory Booker
subject: We need to get big money out of politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | I'm proud that our campaign refuses to take a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. Team, It's now been ten years since the Citizens United ruling, which I believe to be one of the most disastrous Supreme Court decisions of our time. That ruling opened the floodgates for corporate cash to pour into our elections and drown out the voices of millions of Americans -- undermining the basic fundamentals of our democracy at a time when faith in our nation's government is already declining. This past week, I was honored to have earned the endorsement of End Citizens United, a tireless advocacy organization that shares my commitment to reforming our broken campaign finance system. **[I hope you'll stand with me as well in the fight to get big money out of our politics. Add your name if you support overturning Citizens United and returning power to the people.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/end-citizens-united-2020?source=em_pet_20200126_CB_20200126-pet-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** During my run for president, I was very proud that our campaign did not accept a single dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. I'm keeping this same pledge as I run for re-election to the Senate. **No corporate PACs. No federal lobbyists. Instead, we 're relying on grassroots supporters like you to power our campaign.** **[Sign your name here if you agree that corporate PACs and federal lobbyists shouldn't be able to try and influence our elections.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/end-citizens-united-2020?source=em_pet_20200126_CB_20200126-pet-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** It's a big fight we have ahead of us. There are some very powerful special interests that stand in our way. But eventually we'll realize the change we seek -- and our democracy will be stronger because of it. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/end-citizens-united-2020?source=em_pet_20200126_CB_20200126-pet-CB-EM1-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fcb/5fca0d19/7adf4da6/291d3651/3127412383/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fcb/5fca0d19/7adf4da6/291d3650/3127412383/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fcb/5fca0d19/7adf4da6/291d365f/3127412383/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fcb/5fca0d19/7adf4da6/291d365e/3127412383/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/unsubscribe").
